---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for zabt.ai
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope / area
Which part of the stack? (API, worker, transcription/GPU, frontend, deployment, docs, ...)

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or references. Note if you'd be willing to help implement it.
